violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. Sanitizer bucket at back prep table was cloudy color.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. > Food items in the refrigerator were not date marked as required. Cut limes were not date marked as required.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. > Cutting board is heavily stained and marred. This cutting board needs to b e replaced.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. > Ovens have heavy food debris inside and are in need of cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. > The tops of the ovens are covered in food debris that is quite old. The prep station is covered in food debris that appears hasn't been cleaned regularly.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Bottle of low splash bleach was located below 3-compartment sink. Staff indicated that low splash bleach was only used for cleaning floors. Facility relocated low splash bleach to cleaning closet. Low splash bleach is not an approved sanitizer for food contact surfaces. Regular plan bleach must be used.--Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. > 3 Compartment sink has Sani - 10 sanitizer that is reading at 0.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. > Facility currently using chlorine test strips when utilizing Sani- 10 quat sanitizer. Could not locate quat test strips for Sani - 10.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. > Box of single use items are being stored on the floor behind the prep line. The hinge containers must be stored at least 6 inches above the ground .

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (fans) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. -Fans attached to wall above ice machine and fan attached to wall by ovens have accumulation of dust.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
